reviews.review_title: Kiosk mode is the best feature
reviews.review_description: The application convinces with so many supported video and image formats and outstanding support. The best feature for our use case is the kiosk mode: It enables us to use VR headsets at events and give first time users an impression what VR can be without the learning curve. We are looking forward to use it more at events and shows and offer outstanding VR experiences to our guests.

reviews.review_title: Custom logo is great for presentations
reviews.review_description: One of the main interest to me is to add a custom company logo to the app's menu and to adjust the colors to a custom branding which is enabled with this business version. Visual quality is very high.

We have been struggling to find an image viewer app that plays stereo and 360 images. This app not only does it, but has a business version as well in HMS. Amazing developer and an app that has more flexibility than any other image viewer.

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for your great review! We are very happy that it works out so well!

reviews.review_description: Was looking everywhere for a tool like this. Very customizable and top notch support!
